We congratulate Assoc. Prof. Dr. Ezgi Tuncer on her article in Global Networks.

We congratulate Assoc. Prof. Dr. Ezgi TUNCER from our Department of Architecture for her article published in Global Networks: A Journal of Transnational Affairs. Our professor’s article has been published as open access under the Wiley Read and Publish agreement.
